n26-home:0: N26 | An Update from N26 US
n26-home:1: Building the bank the world loves to use
n26-home:2: ## H2: N26 is the beautifully simple, 100% mobile bank that’s trusted by millions of customers across Europe. At the moment, we’re focusing our efforts on our core markets and are no longer offering N26 accounts in the US. If you have any questions regarding your former account, take a look at our FAQs. For the latest news and information about N26, please visit our N26 blog .
n26-home:4: I was an N26 customer, what happened to my account?
n26-home:5: All N26 customers in the US have been sent a notification of account closure to the email address connected to their account. At this point, all accounts have been closed. If you had money in your account, we issued a check to the address we have on file with your remaining account balance.
n26-home:6: I don't have access to my registered email address/registered mailing address, how do I contact you to collect my funds?
n26-home:7: If you need further assistance, please contact N26 customer support at support@n26.com.
n26-home:8: Will I still be able to access my app and transaction details if my account was closed?
n26-home:9: Unfortunately no. Now that all accounts are closed you will not be able to log into the N26 app or website to access historic account information. Please note, any account information needed after account closure can be requested by emailing support@n26.com
n26-home:10: I have another question, how can I speak to customer service?
n26-home:11: Please contact N26 customer support by emailing support@n26.com.

squarespace-home:86: How do I create a website with Squarespace?
squarespace-home:87: You can create your own website by starting a free trial and selecting a professionally designed website template that suits your vision, or create a fully custom website with Squarespace's AI website builder . Use our drag-and-drop editor to customize layouts, images, colors, and fonts. From there, add new pages and features using pre-built layouts or create your own. Add content to your site with AI tools or write your own. Finally, find a custom domain name and publish your website. Then start growing your audience with Squarespace marketing tools or sell products through your own online store.
squarespace-home:88: Do I need to know how to code to build a website?
squarespace-home:89: It's not necessary to understand coding language to create a website with Squarespace. While knowing code can help with building more complex websites, you can quickly make a website on our platform that's fully-customized to fit your brand personality and lets you publish your blog , showcase your portfolio , or sell your products.
squarespace-home:90: What is a website builder and which one is best for me?
squarespace-home:91: A website builder is a platform or tool that allows individuals and businesses to create and manage websites without prior coding or web design experience. Look for a website creator that offers a free trial, user-friendly interface, pre-designed templates, drag-and-drop editing functionality, and various customization options. The best platforms provide these as well as marketing tools , seller features, invoicing, AI tools, and domain name registration . Squarespace features like these not only provide a streamlined process for how to make a website, saving time and effort compared to traditional web development methods, they help you stand out from the competition, expand your audience, and grow your brand.
squarespace-home:92: How much does it cost to create a website?
squarespace-home:93: After a free 14-day trial, Squarespace subscriptions start at $16/mo and give you access to your own custom website and selling tools. More advanced plans offer state-of-the-art ecommerce features and lower payment processing fees. Other fees can include the cost of your domain name, starting at $14 annually for several available top-level-domains . Squarespace also offers year of free custom domain registration on new annual website subscriptions.
squarespace-home:94: Can I get a custom domain name for my website?
squarespace-home:95: Yes, you can get a custom domain name for your website on Squarespace. Look for a domain registrar that offers a wide variety of top-level domains (TLDs) and extensions, and that lets you manage your domain through its platform. Squarespace is a trusted registrar with hundreds of available TLDs and domain extensions for your website. With Squarespace Domains, you get a secure, private domain connection, with domain forwarding, email forwarding, and Premium DNS to ensure that your website is always available online.
squarespace-home:96: How can I offer services with my Squarespace website?
squarespace-home:97: Squarespace makes it easy to showcase your offerings with specific website templates catered to all types of professional services, including consultants, lawyers, designers, and photographers, as well as website templates for various experiences like camps, retreats, adventure travel, and more. You can list services and packages directly on your site with a streamlined checkout process, complete with service descriptions and itineraries, pricing, and imagery. You can also let clients book time or schedule appointments directly through integrated tools like Acuity Scheduling . Additionally, Squarespace Invoicing gives you tools to create professional branded invoices that help you win more clients, all tracked and managed from your Squarespace account. You can also accept several major payment methods directly on your site and offer a seamless checkout experience through Squarespace Payments . Finally, Squarespace makes it easy to promote your services with a suite of built-in marketing tools to get discovered online. Manage your SEO, launch email marketing campaigns, or connect with social media accounts to get your business in front of customers.
squarespace-home:98: Can I sell products online with a Squarespace website?
squarespace-home:99: Squarespace offers a range of tools to help sellers manage their online stores , including payment processing , inventory management, shipping, invoicing , and marketing. Simple, flexible payment and checkout options make shopping on your ecommerce website easy for customers. You'll have access to more ways to sell, from gift cards and digital downloads to offering subscriptions, as well as integrations with popular social media and search platforms that allow you to sync your product catalog to sell via other platforms like Facebook and Google. Sellers can showcase their products with detailed product listings (including comprehensive descriptions, embedded videos, images, and related products); product categories; and unlimited products. Inventory tools help you manage your product stock with a simplified interface, while shipping tools let you set up flexible shipping options, print labels, and more. Additionally, Squarespace Invoicing gives you tools to create professional branded invoices that help you win more clients, all tracked and managed from your Squarespace account.
squarespace-home:100: Does Squarespace offer AI-powered website building tools?
squarespace-home:101: Yes, Squarespace's suite of AI tools can help you create a personalized website in minutes. Blueprint AI allows you to build a website with AI by combining powerful technology with years of design expertise, generating an entire website alongside personalized content with tailored text and high-quality images that match your brand vision. You can also use Squarespace AI tools to create website copy, product descriptions, blog posts, and email campaigns. Blueprint AI works by taking your answers to a few questions about your business and generating exceptional copy, image, and design suggestions. After you review and refine your selections, Blueprint AI transforms your selections into a beautiful, bespoke website. Once your website is live, use Squarespace AI tools to review your SEO or to draft product descriptions, page copy, and email campaigns with the AI writer.
squarespace-home:102: Can I connect my website to social media and third-party apps?
squarespace-home:103: You can connect your Squarespace website to social media and third-party apps, which allows you to push content to social media platforms, display social media feeds on your website, and integrate with services like print on demand providers. Connect your social media accounts (like Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, etc.) to your Squarespace site to display content from your profiles on your website. Automatically send new content from your website (like blog posts) to your connected social media accounts. Add social media icons to your Squarespace site. Automatically share your Squarespace content to your social media platforms when you publish new content. Squarespace also offers a marketplace of extensions , which are customized website plug-ins that help you enhance your site. You can integrate your Squarespace site with various third-party apps for features like financial tools, shipping, and marketing tools .
squarespace-home:104: How can I optimize my site for SEO with Squarespace?
squarespace-home:105: Squarespace features built-in, advanced SEO tools designed to help every website and online store rank in search results. For example, your website comes with default SEO page titles and descriptions, which you can modify without changing the page content visitors see. You can also hide pages if you need to, and control the image people see alongside your content whenever it's shared on social media. With the help of Squarespace AI, you can also generate SEO-friendly website copy and image alt text.
